12px; line-height: 18px;"><div><span style="color: #a79873">import</span><span style="color: #d4d4d4">&nbsp;{&nbsp;</span><span style="color: #dd6a6f">ajax</span><span style="color: #d4d4d4">&nbsp;}&nbsp;</span><span style="color: #a79873">from</span><span style="color: #d4d4d4">&nbsp;</span><span style="color: #569cd6">'rxjs/ajax'</span><span style="color: #d4d4d4">&nbsp;=&nbsp;</span><span style="color: #569cd6">`https://api.github.com/users?per_page=2`</span><span style="color: #d4d4d4">;</span></div><br><div><span style="color: style="color: #f44747">subscribe</span><span style="color: #d4d4d4">(</span></div><div><span style="color: #d4d4d4">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span style="color: #dd6a6f">res</span><span
